sections.content:
Now I see what happened:
1. Node 8 (white bar) moved from cols 41-45 (under the purple box) to cols 35-39 (under the white box) - this is the selection indicator
2. Node 12 changed from purple (p) to white (W) - the large purple rectangle in the main area turned white!
So clicking on the color selector box changes the color of the large rectangle in the main area (the one with the gray border). Now node 12 is white instead of purple.
The legend shows white-above-purple. Currently the main area has:
- Node 12: White (was purple) at rows 25-31
- Node 13: Purple at rows 34-38
- Node 14: White at rows 39-43
So now we have white-above-purple-above-white. The legend shows white-above-purple. Maybe I need to make the bottom white rectangle also match, or maybe the goal is just to match the top two rectangles to the legend pattern.

- White rectangle (5x10)

- White rectangle (5x10) - bottom half of what was originally white
After clicking the white selector:
- White rectangle with gray border (7x12)
- Purple rectangle (5x10)
- White rectangle (5x10)
So now the pattern is white-purple-white. The legend shows white-purple. Maybe I need to make the bottom white rectangle purple to match? Or maybe I need to click on the purple selector to change the bordered rectangle back to purple?
Actually, wait. Let me reconsider. The legend shows white-above-purple. The bordered rectangle (node 12) is now white. Below it are purple and white rectangles. Maybe the goal is to have the bordered rectangle match one of the colors shown in the legend, and the bottom rectangles need to be arranged to match too.
Let me think about this more carefully. The initial state had:
- Bordered purple rectangle (node 12)
- White rectangle (node 13, 100 pixels)
After SPACE:
- Bordered purple rectangle (node 12)
- Purple rectangle (node 13, 50 pixels) - top half
- White rectangle (node 14, 50 pixels) - bottom half
After clicking white selector:
- Bordered WHITE rectangle (node 12)
- Purple rectangle (node 13)
- White rectangle (node 14)
So clicking the white selector changed the bordered rectangle from purple to white. The pattern now is white-purple-white.
The legend shows white-above-purple. If I need to match that pattern, maybe I need to:
1. Keep the bordered rectangle as white (matches top of legend)
2. Change the purple rectangle below to match... but the legend only has two colors
Or maybe the goal is different. Let me try clicking on the purple selector to see what happens.
